_note: Events verified live on real pages this session. Dated rows have a confirmed future date; recurring rows carry a cadence + season. Fixed anchors (Fourth of July, Turkey Trot, Polar Bear Dip) are added by harvest_events.py.

events.title: Cayucos Friday Farmers Market
events.window: Every Friday, 10am to 12:30pm, through Labor Day
events.summary: Local growers and food at D and Ocean Avenue, Friday mornings through Labor Day.

events.title: Live music Sundays at Schooners
events.window: Sunday evenings, 6 to 8pm, May through October
events.summary: Free live music on the oceanfront patio on Sunday evenings through October.

events.title: Brian Waterbury Memorial Rock to Pier Fun Run
events.summary: A 6-mile beach run from Morro Rock that finishes at the Cayucos pier; a half marathon runs the same morning.

events.title: 35th Annual Cayucos Car Show
events.summary: Classic cars downtown with a live band, beer garden, and BBQ. Register via 805Tix.
